title: Keep Scroll Sync — Never lose your reading position
description: Save your scroll position on any page and sync it across your devices through your Chrome account. Private by design.
ogDescription: Never lose your reading position — synced across your devices.

hero.title:
Never lose your
reading position.
hero.subtitle: Save where you stopped reading on any page and pick up right there — on any device, synced through your own Chrome account.

featuresTitle: Everything you need to keep your place

features.title: Save & restore
features.desc: One click saves your exact scroll position. Next time you open the page, it offers to jump you right back.

features.title: Synced across devices
features.desc: Uses your Chrome account sync, so the position you saved on your laptop is waiting on your desktop.

features.title: A directory of pages
features.desc: Every saved page in one tidy list with its title, favicon, and reading progress — click to reopen.

features.title: Speaks your language
features.desc: Available in English, Simplified & Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, and Hindi.

features.title: Private by design
features.desc: No servers, no tracking. Your data stays in your own browser and Chrome account — never sent to us.

features.title: Lightweight
features.desc: A tiny, focused extension that does one thing well and stays out of your way.

ctaTitle: Pick up where you left off.
